option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ComboBox?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ScrollPane?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TextArea?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TextField?> <?import javafx.scene.image.ImageView?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.Region?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.StackPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.TilePane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?> <?import javafx.scene.shape.Rectangle?>
<VBox spacing="16.0" styleClass="page-root" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/20.0.2" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="controllers.LivresController"> <padding><Insets bottom="24.0" left="28.0" right="24.0" top="28.0" /></padding>
<HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="20.0"> <VBox spacing="4.0"> <Label styleClass="page-title" text="Gestion des Livres" /> <Label styleClass="page-subtitle" text="Administrez le catalogue de la bibliothèque" /> </VBox> <Region HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" /> <HBox spacing="10.0" alignment="CENTER_RIGHT"> <TextField fx:id="searchField" prefWidth="280.0" promptText="Rechercher par titre, catégorie ou auteur..." styleClass="search-field" /> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onSearch" text="" styleClass="icon-btn" /> <Button fx:id="addBookButton" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onShowForm" styleClass="primary-button" text="+ Ajouter un livre" /> </HBox> </HBox>
<ScrollPane fitToWidth="true" hbarPolicy="NEVER" VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS" styleClass="cards-scroll"> <TilePane fx:id="cardsTile" hgap="24.0" vgap="24.0" prefColumns="0" alignment="TOP_LEFT" /> </ScrollPane>
<!-- Hidden template for the popup form (not visible in main view) --> <fx:define> <VBox fx:id="formPanel" spacing="12.0" styleClass="popup-form-container" prefWidth="640.0"> <padding><Insets top="18.0" right="20.0" bottom="18.0" left="20.0" /></padding>
<Label fx:id="formTitleLabel" text="Ajouter un nouveau livre" styleClass="form-title" /> <Label text="Remplissez les informations ci-dessous" styleClass="form-subtitle" />
<HBox spacing="10.0"> <VBox spacing="6.0" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <Label text="Titre *" styleClass="field-label" /> <TextField fx:id="titreField" promptText="Titre du livre" styleClass="input-field" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308" /> </VBox> <VBox spacing="6.0" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <Label text="Catégorie *" styleClass="field-label" /> <TextField fx:id="categorieField" promptText="Catégorie" styleClass="input-field" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308" /> </VBox> </HBox>
<HBox spacing="10.0"> <VBox spacing="6.0" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" minWidth="220.0"> <Label text="Prix (TND) *" styleClass="field-label" /> <TextField fx:id="prixField" promptText="0.00" styleClass="input-field" minWidth="210.0" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308" /> </VBox> <VBox spacing="6.0" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" minWidth="220.0"> <Label text="Collection *" styleClass="field-label" /> <ComboBox fx:id="collectionComboBox" promptText="Sélectionner une collection" styleClass="input-field" minWidth="210.0" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308" prefWidth="1.7976931348623157E308" /> </VBox> </HBox>
<HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="12.0"> <Label text="Couverture" styleClass="field-label" /> <StackPane styleClass="image-preview-container"> <Rectangle width="90.0" height="60.0" styleClass="image-placeholder" /> <ImageView fx:id="couvertureImageView" fitWidth="90.0" fitHeight="60.0" preserveRatio="true" /> </StackPane> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onChooseImage" text="Parcourir" styleClass="secondary-button" /> <Label fx:id="couvertureLabel" text="Aucun fichier" styleClass="file-name-label" /> </HBox>
<VBox spacing="6.0"> <Label text="Description *" styleClass="field-label" /> <TextArea fx:id="descriptionArea" prefRowCount="4" wrapText="true" promptText="Description détaillée du livre..." styleClass="input-field" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308" /> </VBox>
<HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="12.0"> <Label text="Fichier PDF *" styleClass="field-label" /> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onChoosePdf" text=" Choisir PDF" styleClass="secondary-button" /> <Label fx:id="pdfLabel" text="Aucun fichier" styleClass="pdf-label" /> </HBox> </VBox> </fx:define> </VBox>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ComboBox?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ScrollPane?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TextArea?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TextField?> <?import javafx.scene.image.ImageView?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.Region?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.StackPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.TilePane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?> <?import javafx.scene.shape.Rectangle?>
<VBox spacing="16.0" styleClass="page-root" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/20.0.2" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="controllers.LivresController"> <padding><Insets bottom="24.0" left="28.0" right="24.0" top="28.0" /></padding>
<HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="20.0"> <VBox spacing="4.0"> <Label styleClass="page-title" text="Gestion des Livres" /> <Label styleClass="page-subtitle" text="Administrez le catalogue de la bibliothèque" /> </VBox> <Region HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" /> <HBox spacing="10.0" alignment="CENTER_RIGHT"> <TextField fx:id="searchField" prefWidth="280.0" promptText="Rechercher par titre, catégorie ou auteur..." styleClass="search-field" /> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onSearch" text="" styleClass="icon-btn" /> <Button fx:id="addBookButton" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onShowForm" styleClass="primary-button" text="+ Ajouter un livre" /> </HBox> </HBox>
<ScrollPane fitToWidth="true" hbarPolicy="NEVER" VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS" styleClass="cards-scroll"> <TilePane fx:id="cardsTile" hgap="24.0" vgap="24.0" prefColumns="0" alignment="TOP_LEFT" /> </ScrollPane>
<!-- Hidden template for the popup form (not visible in main view) --> <fx:define> <VBox fx:id="formPanel" spacing="12.0" styleClass="popup-form-container" prefWidth="640.0"> <padding><Insets top="18.0" right="20.0" bottom="18.0" left="20.0" /></padding>
<Label fx:id="formTitleLabel" text="Ajouter un nouveau livre" styleClass="form-title" /> <Label text="Remplissez les informations ci-dessous" styleClass="form-subtitle" />
<HBox spacing="10.0"> <VBox spacing="6.0" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <Label text="Titre *" styleClass="field-label" /> <TextField fx:id="titreField" promptText="Titre du livre" styleClass="input-field" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308" /> </VBox> <VBox spacing="6.0" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <Label text="Catégorie *" styleClass="field-label" /> <TextField fx:id="categorieField" promptText="Catégorie" styleClass="input-field" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308" /> </VBox> </HBox>
<HBox spacing="10.0"> <VBox spacing="6.0" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" minWidth="220.0"> <Label text="Prix (TND) *" styleClass="field-label" /> <TextField fx:id="prixField" promptText="0.00" styleClass="input-field" minWidth="210.0" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308" /> </VBox> <VBox spacing="6.0" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" minWidth="220.0"> <Label text="Collection *" styleClass="field-label" /> <ComboBox fx:id="collectionComboBox" promptText="Sélectionner une collection" styleClass="input-field" minWidth="210.0" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308" prefWidth="1.7976931348623157E308" /> </VBox> </HBox>
<HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="12.0"> <Label text="Couverture" styleClass="field-label" /> <StackPane styleClass="image-preview-container"> <Rectangle width="90.0" height="60.0" styleClass="image-placeholder" /> <ImageView fx:id="couvertureImageView" fitWidth="90.0" fitHeight="60.0" preserveRatio="true" /> </StackPane> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onChooseImage" text="Parcourir" styleClass="secondary-button" /> <Label fx:id="couvertureLabel" text="Aucun fichier" styleClass="file-name-label" /> </HBox>
<VBox spacing="6.0"> <Label text="Description *" styleClass="field-label" /> <TextArea fx:id="descriptionArea" prefRowCount="4" wrapText="true" promptText="Description détaillée du livre..." styleClass="input-field" maxWidth="1.7976931348623157E308" /> </VBox>
<HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="12.0"> <Label text="Fichier PDF *" styleClass="field-label" /> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onChoosePdf" text=" Choisir PDF" styleClass="secondary-button" /> <Label fx:id="pdfLabel" text="Aucun fichier" styleClass="pdf-label" /> </HBox>
<Label fx:id="formErrorLabel" managed="false" visible="false" wrapText="true" styleClass="popup-error" /> </VBox> </fx:define> </VBox>
